sections.paragraph:
- Original: βιάζω

- Transliteration: Biazo

- Phonetic: bee-ad'-zo

- Definition:

1. to use force, to apply force

2. to force, inflict violence on

- Origin: from G979

- TDNT entry: 1:609,*

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G970; to force that is (reflexively) to crowd oneself (into) or (passively) to be seized: - press suffer violence.
